# Agentic Desk — Full Context

## Project Identity
- **Name:** Agentic Desk
- **Organization:** Arcipelago International
- **Description:** Desktop-native AI second brain with real-time voice assistant, knowledge graph, skill/prompt catalogs, and task management.
- **Status:** Active development — all core features buildable and runnable on macOS.

## Technology Stack

### Desktop Shell
- **Wails v2** (Go) — native macOS WebView (WKWebView), Go ↔ JS bindings
- **Bundle size:** ~15MB
- **Distribution:** `/Applications/agentic-desk.app`
- **Auto-start:** launchd login item at `~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.agentic-desk.plist`

### Frontend (Vue.js)
- **Framework:** Vue.js 3 Composition API + `<script setup>`
- **Build tool:** Vite
- **State management:** Pinia stores (`src/stores/`)
- **Package manager:** npm
- **Audio capture:** AudioWorklet (`pcm-capture-worklet.js`) — raw PCM16 @16kHz
- **Audio playback:** Web Audio API — gapless scheduling with adaptive cursor
- **Icons:** Font Awesome 6.5.1 (CDN)
- **Styling:** Single `style.css` with CSS variables (OKLCH color tokens)
- **All scrollbars hidden** via `scrollbar-width: none` + `::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none }`

### Backend (Go)
- **Language:** Go 1.22+
- **HTTP framework:** Gin (`github.com/gin-gonic/gin`)
- **WebSocket:** Gorilla WebSocket (`github.com/gorilla/websocket`)
- **AI SDK:** `google.golang.org/genai v1.57.0`
- **Genkit:** `github.com/firebase/genkit/go v0.3.0`
- **Desktop framework:** `github.com/wailsapp/wails/v2 v2.9.2`
- **Database driver:** `github.com/jackc/pgx/v5`

### AI & Models
- **Voice:** Gemini Live API (`BidiGenerateContent`) — real-time bidirectional audio
- **Text:** Gemini models via Genkit flows
- **Embeddings:** Google AI embedding models
- **Model IDs:** `gemini-2.5-flash-native-audio-preview-12-2025` (voice), `gemini-2.5-pro` (text)
- **API keys:** GEMINI_API_KEY — from env or `~/Library/Application Support/agentic-desk/.env`

### Database
- **RDBMS:** PostgreSQL (local, trust-auth)
- **Schema migrations:** SQL files in `migrations/`
- **Interface:** `internal/secondbrain/` domain types + Store interface

## Source Code Structure

```
agentic-desk/
├── cmd/
│   ├── desktop/           # Wails desktop app
│   │   ├── main.go        # Entry point, Wails config
│   │   ├── app.go         # Lifecycle (startup/shutdown)
│   │   ├── corelauncher.go# Auto-launches core backend
│   │   ├── secrets.go     # Persisted env for packaged app
│   │   └── frontend/      # Vue.js SPA
│   │       ├── src/
│   │       │   ├── App.vue
│   │       │   ├── main.js
│   │       │   ├── style.css
│   │       │   ├── components/
│   │       │   │   ├── VoiceView.vue         (~1100 lines, voice assistant)
│   │       │   │   ├── TasksView.vue
│   │       │   │   ├── SkillCatalogView.vue
│   │       │   │   ├── PromptCatalogView.vue
│   │       │   │   ├── KnowledgeGraphView.vue
│   │       │   │   ├── MemorySearch.vue
│   │       │   │   ├── ProfileView.vue
│   │       │   │   ├── ProjectContextView.vue
│   │       │   │   ├── CatalogItemModal.vue  (shared detail modal)
│   │       │   │   └── icons/
│   │       │   ├── lib/
│   │       │   │   ├── voiceLive.js          (mic capture + playback SDK)
│   │       │   │   └── markdown.js           (rendering)
│   │       │   └── stores/
│   │       │       └── core.js               (Pinia store)
│   │       └── public/
│   │           └── pcm-capture-worklet.js    (AudioWorklet)
│   └── core/              # Standalone backend binary
├── internal/
│   ├── api/               # HTTP+WS routes
│   ├── secondbrain/       # Domain types + Store interface
│   │   └── postgres/      # Postgres adapter
│   ├── agentloop/         # Plan/Act/Observe/Critique loop
│   ├── voicelive/         # Gemini Live relay (WebSocket bridge)
│   ├── genkit/            # Genkit init + flow registration
│   ├── embedding/         # Embedder wrapper + bounded pool
│   ├── eval/              # Evaluator interface
│   ├── importer/          # Markdown parser
│   ├── config/            # Env loading
│   └── tools/             # Tool implementations
├── docs/
│   ├── ARCHITECTURE.md    # Full architecture with Mermaid diagrams
│   ├── adr/              # Architecture Decision Records
│   ├── designs/          # Feature design documents
│   ├── superpowers/specs/# Major sub-project specs
│   ├── guides/           # Getting started, how-to guides
│   └── api/              # API documentation
├── skills/               # Shipped agent skills (25+)
├── prompts/              # Dotprompt files
├── migrations/           # SQL migrations
├── brand/                # Brand assets
├── AGENTS.md             # Entry point for developers/agents
├── SYSTEM.md             # System context
├── MEMORY.md             # Data model
├── SKILL.md              # Agent skill model
├── PLAN.md               # Implementation plan
├── SESSION_HANDOFF.md    # Current session state
└── Makefile              # Build automation
```

## Audio Pipeline — Detailed

### Input Path (user speaks → Gemini hears)
1. **Microphone → AudioWorklet** — `getUserMedia({sampleRate:16000, channelCount:1})`
2. **Buffer accumulation** — 512 Float32 samples (32ms) — reduced from 2048 (128ms)
3. **Int16 conversion + postMessage** — AudioWorkletProcessor → main thread
4. **WebSocket send** — binary frame (raw PCM16) → Go backend
5. **Go relay → Gemini Live API** — `session.SendRealtimeInput()`
6. **Client-side VAD** — RMS < noiseFloor × 1.5 → skip sending (saves ~80% silent frames)

### Processing
- **ASR + LLM inference + TTS** — 1-3s typical (hard ceiling, Gemini-side)

### Output Path (Gemini responds → user hears)
1. **Gemini → Go relay** — audio chunks + transcript text
2. **Go → browser** — binary WS (audio) + text WS (transcript JSON)
3. **AudioContext playback** — 24kHz, gapless scheduling
4. **Adaptive cursor** — resets to `currentTime + 50ms` if drifted >300ms
5. **Barge-in** — `flush()` resets cursor to now

### Key Latency Metrics
| Stage | Latency |
|-------|---------|
| AudioWorklet chunk | 32ms |
| postMessage + JS | ~1ms |
| Local WS RTT | ~3ms |
| Go → Gemini RTT | ~300ms |
| Gemini processing | 1-3s |
| Playback cursor drift | <30ms (adaptive) |
| **Perceived gap** | **~1.3-3.3s** |

## Key ADRs (Architecture Decision Records)

- **ADR-1:** Use Wails v2 for desktop shell (Go-based, native WKWebView)
- **ADR-2:** Gemini Live API for real-time voice (bidirectional WebSocket, server VAD)
- **ADR-3:** AudioWorklet for mic capture (raw PCM16, not compressed blobs)
- **ADR-4:** Go backend as local API server (auto-launched child process)
- **ADR-5:** PCM16 binary frames over WebSocket (reference-proven protocol)
- **ADR-6:** Separate capture (16kHz) and playback (24kHz) AudioContexts
- **ADR-7:** Persisted env file for keys in packaged app (`~/.env`)

## Build & Run

```bash
# Prerequisites
go install github.com/wailsapp/wails/v2/cmd/wails@latest

# Build frontend
cd cmd/desktop/frontend && npm install && npm run build

# Build desktop app
make desktop-build    # or: wails build

# Configure API key
make configure-key KEY=AIza...

# Run
make desktop-run      # opens /Applications/agentic-desk.app

# Development
make web              # browser-only frontend at localhost:5173
make test             # Go unit tests
```

## Engineering Conventions

1. **Separation of Concerns** — domain packages (`secondbrain`, `agentloop`, `eval`) have ZERO framework imports. Adapters in sub-packages.
2. **YAGNI** — build what's needed now, not what might be needed later.
3. **Bounded goroutines** — every pool has fixed worker count, context-cancel shutdown, leak test.
4. **Zero-trust** — verify SDK signatures against actual source code, not docs or blog posts.
5. **Documentation** — every change updates docs in the same commit. Drift is a bug.

## Common Pitfalls

1. **Duplicate app instance** — use `open /Applications/agentic-desk.app`, not direct binary execution
2. **WKWebView limitations** — no Web Speech API, AudioWorklet must be verified on target macOS version
3. **Preview model churn** — Gemini preview model IDs change; always verify before shipping
4. **AudioContext state** — must `await ctx.resume()` after creation due to autoplay policy
5. **Double AudioContext close** — shared contexts must only be closed once (fixed in LevelMeter refactor)

## Documentation Personas

| Role | Focus | Entry Point |
|------|-------|-------------|
| 🧑‍💻 New Developer | Getting started, build, run | `AGENTS.md` |
| 🛠️ Feature Engineer | How-to guides, code patterns | `docs/guides/` |
| 🏗️ Architect | System design, ADRs, API docs | `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`, `docs/adr/` |
| 🤖 AI Agent | Structured context, llms.txt | `llms.txt`, `AGENTS.md` |
